prefixes.title: style
prefixes.description: changes that do not affect the meaning of the code

prefixes.title: refactor
prefixes.description: a code change that neither fixes a bug nor adds a feature

prefixes.title: perf
prefixes.description: a code change that improves performance

prefixes.title: test
prefixes.description: adding missing tests or correcting existing tests

prefixes.title: chore
prefixes.description: changes to the build process or auxiliary tools and libraries

prefixes.title: ci
prefixes.description: changes to our CI configuration files and scripts
